text: Entering this space, I feel a gentle tension between curiosity and the strange impersonality of a modern showcase. The glass, the angles, the bright colors: they all speak to the search for knowledge, yet there is a barrier between me and the displays, as if ideas are suspended—inviting me to ponder, but also to question my own role as observer. In here, the abstraction of research and the tactile reality of fire extinguishers and screens collide, quietly reminding me that inquiry itself is always somewhere between safety and risk.
